name: Interval Tree
description: Build an interval tree and query all overlapping intervals in O(log n + k) time.
intuition: Augmented BST: each node stores an interval [lo,hi] sorted by lo. Each node also stores max_hi — the maximum hi in its subtree. To find overlaps with query [ql,qr]: recurse left if left.max_hi >= ql, check current node, recurse right if node.lo <= qr.
